## Why Convergence Awareness Matters

AGOL refinement work can improve Product 1, but repeated mutation after a
direction has stabilized can degrade enterprise trust, visual continuity, and
operational clarity.

Convergence awareness gives AGOL a bounded way to notice when user feedback has
shifted from dissatisfaction to preservation. This reduces unnecessary
refinement pressure without preventing future user-directed changes.

## Over-Refinement Reduction

The primitive reduces over-refinement risk by producing replay-visible guidance
for:

- stabilized regions;
- freeze-zone recommendations;
- mutation pressure risk;
- local-refinement-only scope;
- preserve-existing-direction signals.

These outputs are advisory. They do not freeze files or block mutation.

## Enterprise UX Stabilization

Product 1 depends on a stable enterprise UX direction: restrained institutional
atmosphere, concrete operational symbolism, replay-safe governance framing, and
clear AGOL continuity.

The primitive helps preserve successful UX evolution while keeping future
refinement bounded and user-authorized.

## Difference From Autonomous AI Control

This finalization does not create autonomous control.

The primitive does not:

- redesign Product 1;
- mutate files;
- execute commands;
- control runtime;
- orchestrate processes;
- enforce freeze zones;
- override user intent.

It only produces deterministic convergence guidance.

## Continuity Degradation Risk Reduction

By detecting mutation pressure against stabilized areas, AGOL can warn when
continued broad restructuring may create continuity drift, refinement fatigue,
or style regression.

This protects governance-native product continuity without claiming that any UX
state is permanently final.

## Monetizable UX Stability

Long-term Product 1 monetization benefits from a stable, trustworthy enterprise
presentation. Convergence-aware refinement supports that by preserving successful
institutional patterns and focusing future refinement on unresolved areas.

## Replay Fields

Finalization preserves:

- `primitive_id`;
- `request_hash`;
- `command_hash`;
- `scope_hash`;
- `deterministic_hash`;
- `replay_lineage`.

## Certification Result

Certification target:
`CERTIFIED_BOUNDED_CONVERGENCE_AWARE_REFINEMENT`

The primitive is finalized as bounded, deterministic, proposal-only convergence
guidance.
